name: Bar-b-q Walnuts
recipeIngredient: 2 cups walnuts, or assorted favorite nuts such as whole almonds, cashews, pecans and peanuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, melt the margarine.
2. Add the Head Country Bar-B-Q Sauce, Seasoning, and hot pepper sauce to the melted margarine. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Stir in the walnuts, ensuring they are evenly coated with the mixture.
4. Spread the nut mixture in a shallow baking sheet.
5. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Allow the mixture to cool and regain its firmness before serving. It makes approximately 16 appetizer servings.
